_comment: RunPod Serverless endpoint for the HERO text model (gpt-oss-120b) -- Deploy D2. Same scale-to-zero contract as the 20b default; single 80GB GPU. Set MODEL_NAME so the worker's default matches, and keep workersMin=0.
name: neuromod-gpt-oss-120b

_notes.gpuTypeIds: 120b needs an 80GB card (4-bit still ~65GB+activations). H100 gives the best cold-start.
_notes.workersMax: Capped at 2 -> hero endpoint can't run away with spend (Deploy D4).
_notes.idleTimeout: Larger cold-start here; consider bumping idleTimeout to 15-30s if traffic is bursty.
